name: Device Installation Blocked
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Device Installation Blocked
SIGMA Description: Detects an installation of a device that is forbidden by the system policy

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6423 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Device Installation Blocked on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6423 AQL filter query
